    Why buy from Microsoft Store

    Learn more

    • Free shipping

    • Flexible payment options

    • Microsoft Complete

    • Free returns

    Frequently asked questions

    |

    • Surface Laptop is a great option for students who want a lightweight device with long battery life for everyday schoolwork. Built-in AI features help support multitasking, research, and overall productivity. It’s well-suited for note-taking, writing papers, and managing coursework, with a range of sizes and storage options to fit different schedules and budgets. Student laptop discounts are available at Microsoft Store.

    • Yes. All Microsoft Surface devices feature touchscreen displays, making it easy to tap, scroll, and interact directly with what’s on the screen. Surface Pro also supports Surface Pen and Surface Slim Pen for writing and drawing. Touch also works alongside built-in AI features to support smoother multitasking and everyday productivity.

    • Microsoft Store is an online store, so there aren’t physical retail locations to visit. Wherever you are, you can shop a wide range of products—including Surface devices, Windows PCs and tablets, Xbox consoles, accessories, and more—compare models and bundles, and find current deals all in one place. Microsoft Store also offers easy returns, flexible payment options on eligible purchases, and free shipping on qualifying orders, making it simple to save, compare, and shop with confidence.

    • Microsoft Store is the official destination to buy Microsoft Surface devices, PCs, accessories, gaming consoles, software, and more. You can compare models, explore current offers and bundles, and choose the configuration that fits your needs. Delivery, returns, and support are built in, with flexible payment options available on eligible purchases.

    • Microsoft Surface is a family of Windows devices designed by Microsoft, bringing together sleek design, responsive touchscreen displays, powerful performance, and next-level AI experiences. Surface Laptop and the 2-in-1 Surface Pro are built for everyday productivity and multitasking. Built-in AI features help streamline work and manage tasks more efficiently. Explore specs, compare models, and find deals on Surface devices at Microsoft Store.

    • You can buy Microsoft Surface directly from Microsoft Store. Microsoft Store brings together Surface models, configurations, bundles, and deals in one place, along with the accessories and software you may need to get set up. You’ll also find flexible payment options for eligible purchases, plus straightforward returns and support to help you choose the right device with confidence.

    • Microsoft Surface is a great choice for gaming, delivering fast performance, responsive graphics, and touchscreen displays that make games feel more interactive. It supports a range of PC gaming experiences, including many popular PC games through the Xbox app and PC Game Pass.

    • Surface Pro is a strong choice for drawing, with a high-resolution touchscreen display that supports Surface Pen and Surface Slim Pen. It includes built-in AI capabilities that help keep creative apps responsive and multitasking smooth while you sketch, annotate, or create directly on the screen. This combination makes Surface Pro well suited for artists, students, and creative work that benefits from pen input.

    • Microsoft Surface is a strong choice for photo and video editing. Surface devices offer the performance and high-quality displays needed for creative work like editing photos, cutting video, and multitasking across apps. Built-in AI helps keep creative workflows running smoothly by managing background tasks, so you can stay focused on your edits.

    • Microsoft Surface devices are designed for business use, with capabilities that support AI-powered productivity and multitasking from the start. Surface devices focus on security, mobility, and Windows productivity apps to help teams work efficiently across the office, home, and on the go. For organizations with more specific needs, Surface for Business offers configurations and services built for professional environments.

    • For business travel, Surface Laptop and Surface Pro are built to balance performance, portability, and flexibility. They include built-in AI capabilities that support productivity and multitasking while you’re on the move. Surface Laptop offers long battery life and a lightweight design for working on the go, while Surface Pro adds versatility as a 2-in-1 that adapts easily between laptop and tablet use.

    • Microsoft Surface is a strong fit for architects, offering powerful performance, high-quality displays, and responsive touchscreen options that support detailed design work. Built-in AI features help streamline multitasking and manage background processes for smoother workflows on complex projects. Surface Pro also supports pen input, making it easy to sketch ideas and mark up drawings as you work.

    • Microsoft Surface devices feature responsive PixelSense™ touchscreens designed to support productivity, creativity, and everyday tasks. Surface Laptop delivers a traditional laptop experience with the added flexibility of touch, while Surface Pro combines a 2-in-1 design with support for Surface Pen and Surface Slim Pen for writing and drawing directly on the screen. Built-in AI capabilities help keep apps responsive and multitasking smooth, making it easy to move between work, school, and creative projects.

    • Microsoft Surface includes both traditional laptops and 2-in-1 devices that function as a laptop and a tablet. Surface Laptop offers a classic clamshell design with a touchscreen, while Surface Pro adds versatility with a detachable keyboard, built-in kickstand, and support for Surface Pen and Surface Slim Pen for writing and drawing, allowing it to switch easily between laptop and tablet modes.

    Why buy from Microsoft Store

    Free 2-3 day shipping

    Free shipping at no cost, no minimum amount.
    Learn more about shipping

    Buy now, pay later. As low as 0% APR.

    Flexible payment options help you pay how you want, at Microsoft Store.
    Learn about flexible payment options

    Microsoft Complete

    Get coverage on accidental damage for up to four years. Shop smarter with Microsoft Complete and get technical support as well.
    Learn about Microsoft Complete

    Free 60-day returns

    Return almost any physical product within 60 days in like-new condition in its original packaging for a full refund. Some exclusions apply.
    Learn about returns
    Learn about all the benefits of shopping at Microsoft Store​
    Discounts: Supplies limited. Actual savings depends on product availability.
    • Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit. Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.
    • Price protection: Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new or refurbished consumer and commercial physical products made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes commercial and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. Both price adjustments: Price Adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support with your Microsoft Account information and any other information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment total per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit. See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers.

    • Trade-In: Available only through the Microsoft Store online in the United States. Offer valid for reimbursements after trade in of a qualifying device (PC, laptop, mobile phone, tablet, or video game console). To be eligible for trade in, (i) you must own the qualifying device, (ii) the device must power on, (iii) the battery must hold a charge (the device must not be required to be plugged in to operate), and (iv) the device must be in fully-functional, working condition and not have broken or missing components, a cracked display or screen, liquid damage, modification(s) or the device warranty seal broken. The device cannot be password protected and must include its original chargers, accessories, and hard drive. Customer must mail in the qualifying trade-in device to be eligible for reimbursement. Devices determined to not meet eligibility criteria may be shipped back to the customer or recycled. Recycled devices are not eligible for cash back. All trade-ins are final. Cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or gift cards, or credit towards other devices or products. May not be combined with other offers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

      This offer is operated by Teladvance, LLC and is not sponsored by Microsoft. Any appraised value will be determined at trade in and provided by Teladvance. All trade-ins and reimbursements are subject to Teladvance’s sole discretion and approval.

    *Eligibility

    • Education discount available to all (i) students and parents of students, including students enrolled in primary and grammar school through higher education, as well as home school programs, and (ii) faculty currently working in education. 
    • Military discount available to active, former and retired military members, and their immediate families.
    • Public entities, government entities, nonprofit organizations, educational institutions, enterprise purchasers, and business / commercial purchasers do not qualify.
       

    Applicable Products

    Discount valid on select physical consumer products. Discount does not apply to the following products:

    • Xbox consoles, games, and accessories
    • Surface for Business devices
    • Personalized or customized products
    • Digital games, digital apps, in-app content and subscriptions, and associated content
    • Office software & apps
    • Windows 11 and Windows 10
    • Gift cards
    • Services/subscriptions (e.g., Microsoft 365, Game Pass, and Skype)
       

    False representations of eligibility voids this offer, and Microsoft reserves the right to collect the full price of product(s) ordered. Bulk orders not valid and may be cancelled. Microsoft reserves the right to determine eligibility in its discretion. Number of products per purchase may be subject to limitations. Commercial purchases not eligible. Personal use only. Available only at Microsoft Store online in the United States. May not be combinable with other offers. Not valid on prior orders or purchases; cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or promo code(s). Refunds will take into account the discount. Price discount does not include taxes, shipping or other fees.

    • Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.
    • **Offer valid with purchase of any new Surface Pro Copilot+ PC or Surface Laptop Copilot+ PC made between February 02nd, 2026 – June 30th, 2026 (the “Promotion Period”) after trade in of qualifying device where the customer submits the online trade-in claim for their used device, plus proof of purchase for new device during the Promotion Period, while supplies last. Available only in Microsoft Store online in the United States. Refurbished device purchases do not qualify for the offer. To be eligible for trade in, (i) you must own the qualifying device, (ii) the device must power on, (iii) the battery must hold a charge (the device must not be required to be plugged in to operate), and (iv) the device must be in fully-functional, working condition and not have broken or missing components, a cracked display or screen, liquid damage, modification(s) or the device warranty seal broken. The device cannot be password protected and must include its original chargers, accessories, and hard drive. Customer must mail in the qualifying trade-in device to be eligible for reimbursement within 15 days of completing the online trade-in process. Devices determined to not meet eligibility criteria may be shipped back to the customer or recycled. Recycled devices are not eligible for cash back. All trade-ins are final. Trade in value depends on device type and condition after inspection by Teladvance. All trade-ins and reimbursements are subject to Teladvance’s sole discretion and approval. See Microsoft Store Trade-in Program for steps and requirements. Not valid on prior orders or purchases; cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or gift cards, or credit towards other devices or products. May not be combined with other offers. Void where prohibited or restricted by law. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time. Limit of 1 trade-in per qualifying Surface device purchase per customer.

    • ^Terms and Conditions 

      These Offer Terms and Conditions (“Offer Terms”) constitute the entire agreement between Microsoft and participants with respect to this Offer and supersede all prior or contemporaneous statements, representations or other communications relating to the Offer. In the event of any conflict or inconsistency between these Offer Terms and any other Offer-related materials, including but not limited to FAQs, advertisements or short-form disclosures, these Offer Terms will control.

      Offer Term 

      Offer valid from April 15, 2026, to 11:59pm Pacific Time on August 31, 2026, while supplies of eligible PCs last.

      Eligibility and redemption

      Offer is valid only for verified college students physically located in the United States at time of qualifying PC purchase. Verified college or university students (collectively, “college students”) who are new subscribers are eligible for a free 1-year Microsoft 365 Premium subscription (ARV: $199.99), a free 1-year Xbox Game Pass Ultimate subscription (ARV: $359.88), and a free Xbox Design Lab Wireless Controller (ARV: $79.99), whose colors may be customized (subject to availability). Other customizations available at additional cost. If custom color controllers are no longer available, Microsoft will provide an Xbox Wireless Controller in a preset color ($49.06 with discount; ARV: $64.99) instead. 

      Verification requires purchase of an eligible PC, available while supplies last. A list of eligible PCs is available here. Subscriptions and Xbox Wireless Controller available post-purchase after Microsoft has successfully verified student status with a valid .edu email address from an accredited university or college in the U.S. 

      Microsoft reserves the right to determine eligibility in its discretion.

      Subscription eligibility and auto-renewal terms 

      Redemption must be completed by 11:59pm Pacific Time on July 31, 2026. A Microsoft account (“MSA”) is required to redeem each subscription. Microsoft 365 Premium is only available to verified college students who are new Microsoft 365 Premium subscribers and to existing Microsoft 365 Personal and Family subscribers who upgrade their existing subscription and all remaining time to Microsoft 365 Premium. See Switch between Microsoft 365 subscriptions. Xbox Game Pass Ultimate is only available to new Xbox Game Pass subscribers. See Xbox Subscriptions Terms & Conditions. If Xbox Game Pass Ultimate subscription is activated prior to college student verification, you must complete verification within 5 days of such activation or the Xbox Game Pass Ultimate subscription will be deactivated. 

      A valid payment method is required to redeem the subscriptions. After 1 year, you’ll continue to be charged the applicable monthly subscription fee unless you cancel. See Microsoft Store Terms of Sale . You may cancel by visiting account.microsoft.com/services.

      Controller fulfillment 

       Controllers ship to U.S. addresses only. The Xbox Wireless Controller will be shipped to the U.S. address provided during the redemption process. PO Boxes, APO/FPO addresses, and some U.S. territories (Guam and Northern Mariana Islands) are not eligible. Microsoft contracts with ESW for Xbox Design Lab order fulfillment and the applicable terms for such fulfillment are available at checkout and here.

      PC returns and exchanges 

      Returns of eligible PCs are subject to retailers’ terms of sale. Microsoft reserves the right to modify, suspend or discontinue this offer at any time, and to disqualify any redemption of a subscription and/or Xbox Wireless Controller, that Microsoft determines, in its sole discretion, to be fraudulent, incomplete, invalid or in violation of these Offer Terms.   

      Additional terms and restrictions 

      Except as otherwise provided in these Offer Terms, offer may not be combined with other offers or promotional subscriptions and cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or promo code(s). Limited to one eligible PC per verified college student and Microsoft account. 

      Promotion has no cash value except where required by law. Taxes, if any, are the sole responsibility of the recipient. Offer void where prohibited or restricted by law.

    • [1]AI features only available to subscription owner and cannot be shared; usage limits apply. Learn more. Minimum age limits may apply to use of AI features. Details. 

      [2]Game library varies over time, by device, and Xbox Game Pass plan. See Xbox Game Pass.

      [3]Select devices (Compatible devices for Xbox Cloud Gaming). Cloud playable games not included with Xbox Game Pass are sold separately. Game library varies (Compatible devices for Xbox Cloud Gaming). Stream directly on Xbox consoles, or with the Xbox app or at xbox.com/play on supported devices. 

      [4]Microsoft account required. Rewards vary by Rewards Level. Terms apply: Rewards with Xbox. Gameplay rewards for 18+. Microsoft.com/msa.
